text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Sakura Chiyono O and I gear up to challenge the
big race at the end of the year, the Arima Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
"A sakura's blossoms may scatter in spring, but
deep down, its roots are always growing!" Who'd
have thought I'd be able to run in a long-distance
race!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Hehe... Trainer, did you know there's something
special about me running in the Arima?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Ooh, wait! So you didn't sign me up with that in
mind? If this is all a happy coincidence, maybe it
should stay as my little secret.
choice_data_list: Huh? You can't say that and not tell me!
Huh? You can't say that and not tell me!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Hehe! I was just kidding. I'll tell you.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
The Arima Kinen is one of the races Maruzen
wasn't able to run in.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: There was an article about a Umamusume who did run it, though. They called her "a miracle fast enough to rival Maruzensky."

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Now I'm Maruzen's rival. Isn't that right, Trainer?
choice_data_list: Right. Let's show her what a strong rival you are.
Right. Let's show her what a strong rival you are.

text_block_list.name: Mr. C.B.
text_block_list.text: Why, welcome, dear rival of the Hot Rod.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Huh? C.B.?! You're running this race too?!

text_block_list.name: Mr. C.B.
text_block_list.text:
Yes. I was so impressed by that spectacular,
heart-stopping race you two showed me before.

text_block_list.name: Mr. C.B.
text_block_list.text:
It seems it's not Maruzen I must run against, but
you.

text_block_list.name: Mr. C.B.
text_block_list.text:
After all, I'm not the type to dance with the
divine. I prefer to run down the earth and make it
tremble.

text_block_list.name: Mr. C.B.
text_block_list.text:
I'm a free spirit who seeks to challenge all those
who send a thrill through my heart. Now... how
about you show me what you've got?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Gladly! Let's have a good race!
